nodes.text: A TRAILER FOR A COMING ATTRACTION:
Reading Goethe’s Faust in the tub, smoking judiciously the last of my reefer, peeling back foiled squares of holiday fudge — I realize I must concoct mine own interpretation.
I will write a post-modern screenplay full of playful update, cultural significance — it will do what all good sequel reboots do.
Here be the Internet as player, the spy cam as eye of fate, the indie emo wiccan soothsayer post-industrialized world we live in.
I will rename Mephistopheles — Dickens Dean. And Satan — Antagonist.
Cast myself and friends as in-player parts and summon post-production magic.
Keep the name. It is universal. Timeless.
Shoot the intimate on iphone and digital cameras, and as the world expands make significant beauty in HD.
It hurts to think this play has already started and I just now realize it must be completed.
I could never be Goethe — can just be me and let he himself shine through.
Faust I could play myself — as did he.
